item.title: Open Position!!!
item.description:
We are actively recruiting a Postdoctoral Research Associate in Quantitative Ecology and Data Science. The position is for a 1 year term (beginning Fall 2026), with the possibility for extension a second and third year based on performance.

See the full position description and application instructions here.

We will begin evaluating applications on April 31st, but applications will be accepted until the position is filled.

item.title: Open Postdoctoral Position
item.description:
We are actively recruiting a Postdoctoral Research Associate in Quantitative Ecology and Data Science. The position is for a 1 year term (beginning Fall 2026), with the possibility for extension a second and third year based on performance.

See the full position description and application instructions here.

We will begin evaluating applications on April 31st, but applications will be accepted until the position is filled.
